role_model.orchestrator: coordinate issue lifecycle and compliance gates
role_model.planner: produce patch plan and risk-aware execution sequence
role_model.implementer: remediate issue and capture implementation evidence
role_model.reviewer: challenge root cause and fix completeness
role_model.independent_validator: validate fix independently from implementer reasoning
role_model.release_certifier: certify patch readiness and residual risk statement

validation_gates: PR summary explains what changed and why
